report.changed: The proof pack walks a crowded outer-shell route and keeps the player marker brighter than every branch line at each keyframe.
report.regressed: No regression is expected in the isolated harness; this is a new evidence lane rather than a replacement of shipping runtime visuals.
report.better: Player-vs-route separation now has a repeatable screenshot packet across five viewports instead of one-off ad hoc captures.
report.worse: Square and narrow portrait frames intentionally show less peripheral route context to keep the active tile readable.
report.humanJudgment: Confirm that the player glyph is still glance-readable when route density spikes near the branch fan.

report.changed: The proof pack records a stepped shell rotation where the connector state changes only on discrete, named angles.
report.regressed: No free-spin path is shown; the harness intentionally rejects analog camera drift as proof.
report.better: Before and after consequences are now locked to screenshots, motion keyframes, and a short review video in the same packet.
report.worse: Intermediate frames stay schematic and do not attempt production lighting or post effects.
report.humanJudgment: Confirm that the rotation video reads as a learnable state change instead of a disorienting camera move.

report.changed: The proof pack isolates one connector cluster and shows misaligned, cueing, and aligned states as a fixed local packet.
report.regressed: The harness drops decorative shell noise around the focus crop so connector legibility remains the only question.
report.better: Connector readability now has a stable focus crop instead of relying on a full-frame screenshot and memory.
report.worse: The local focus crop hides unrelated shell context by design to keep the alignment test bounded.
report.humanJudgment: Confirm that the aligned bridge reads as open without needing the text legend or debug labels.

report.changed: The proof pack opens from a local shell view into a vantage frame that re-establishes shell and landmark relationships.
report.regressed: The observatory sequence uses hard-held frames rather than cinematic camera easing so orientation remains inspectable.
report.better: Orientation recovery now has a repeatable motion packet with stills, focus crop, and contact sheet across the viewport matrix.
report.worse: The mobile and square passes compress side legend space to keep the planet centered and the shell labels on screen.
report.humanJudgment: Confirm that the after frame genuinely restores bearings instead of just looking wider.

report.changed: The proof pack shows one short progression loop from locked checkpoint to cleared checkpoint with the next proxy becoming legible.
report.regressed: The sequence stays bounded to a single regional slice; it does not attempt to prove the entire planet in one artifact.
report.better: Checkpoint readability, proxy visibility, and local objective handoff now share the same packet contract as rotation and vantage proofs.
report.worse: Because the slice is bounded, long-route spectacle is intentionally absent from this scenario.
report.humanJudgment: Confirm that the checkpoint completion feels satisfying before the next target proxy appears.
